style_effects: Gentle, translucent water droplets cling to Ditto's form, slowly sliding downward before dissolving into shimmering ripples. A soft, cool blue light emanates from its pores, casting gentle reflections on the surrounding air like a calm lake. The aura glows with a pale aquamarine hue, forming a faint, rippling halo around its body. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
